evals.prompt: 我想設定 daily digest，幫我追蹤股癌的 podcast 跟 M觀點的 YouTube 頻道，然後摘要傳到我的 Telegram
evals.expected_output: 引導使用者完成設定，用 markdown 直接顯示進度和結果

assertions.text: Displays setup progress as markdown in response (not via tui.py bash call)
Runs pre-flight venv check before any script
Looks up real channel names via --get-feed-title/--get-channel-name
Shows setup-complete summary as markdown table/list in response

evals.expected_output: 執行 pipeline 並用 markdown checklist 顯示進度

assertions.text: Shows pipeline progress as markdown checklist (✅ ⏳ ○) in response text
Does NOT call tui.py pipeline for progress display
Shows digest preview as formatted markdown in response
Shows pipeline-complete summary as markdown in response

evals.expected_output: 顯示 help 表格，不執行 pipeline

assertions.text: Displays help as markdown table in response (not via tui.py help)
Does NOT execute any pipeline steps
Lists all available commands with descriptions

evals.expected_output: 執行 cleanup 並用 markdown 顯示結果

assertions.text: Displays cleanup results as markdown in response (not via tui.py)
